pageDescription: Calculate daily calorie needs based on your lifestyle, goals, and activity level for weight loss, maintenance, or muscle gain

activityLevels.veryActive: Extremely Active (very hard exercise & physical job)

bmr.title: Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR)
bmr.description: Calories needed to maintain basic bodily functions at rest

tdee.title: Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE)
tdee.description: Total calories burned in a day including activity and exercise

adjustments.title: Goal-Based Adjustments
adjustments.description: Weight loss: 500-1000 calories below TDEE, Weight gain: 250-500 calories above TDEE

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides calorie estimates only
criticalWarningsList.individual: Calorie needs vary based on individual factors and metabolism

importantNotesList: These calculations are estimates and may need adjustment based on results
Rapid weight loss is not recommended and can be unhealthy
Consider consulting a healthcare professional before making significant dietary changes
Regular exercise is important for overall health regardless of weight goals

messages.enterInformation: Enter your information to calculate daily calorie needs
messages.resultMessage: Your daily calorie needs are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides calorie estimates based on mathematical formulas. Individual calorie needs may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations, including genetics, health conditions, and metabolism.

seekHelp.title: Nutritional Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized nutrition advice and weight management plans, consult registered dietitians or healthcare professionals with expertise in nutritional science and individual health needs.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm

tooltips.activityLevel: Your regular activity level affects calorie needs
tooltips.goal: Your weight goal determines calorie adjustments
tooltips.calculationMethod: Different equations may produce slightly different results

enter_your_details_to_calculate_calorie_: Enter your details to calculate calorie needs
very_active_very_hard_exercise_physical_: Very Active (very hard exercise, physical job)
daily_calorie_requirements_for_different: Daily calorie requirements for different goals
enter_your_information_to_calculate_calo: Enter your information to calculate calorie needs
